column1: I ... do a lot of homework yesterday.
She ... stay at home because she did not feel well.
Pete ... stay at home because it was very cold.
Mike ... write this exercise at school because he had not done it at home.
I haven’t written my essay. I ... write it on Sunday.
It will rain tomorrow. You ... to put on your raincoat.
Peter and Tom ... work hard every day.
Pete's eyes are very bad, and he ... wear glasses.
School starts at eight o'clock, so we ... get up early.
We ... study maths at school, because it's compulsory.
